impact: This lets the daemon stop repeating the failing schema assumption from the rolled-back test and resume autonomous fixture-first progress with a deterministic next task: validate exact committed fixture paths and known schema keys before broader lifecycle extraction work.
summary: Parked the retry-exhausted checkbox-18 validator attempt and inserted a narrower exact-schema recovery task that tells the daemon how to read the accepted extension lifecycle fixtures without assuming nonexistent evidence-map fields.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-15: Add a minimal extension-only lifecycle process skeleton fixture with required facts, required documents, user decisions, citation-backed action gates, and explicit no-live-automation notes from existing fixtures only.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
